recommendations.title: Inseminoid
recommendations.overview: A crew of interplanetary archaeologists is threatened when an alien creature impregnates one of their members, causing her to turn homicidal and murder them one by one.

recommendations.title: Dragon Rider
recommendations.overview: An unlikely trio of heroes – a dragon, a boy and a forest brownie – embark on an epic adventure to find the “Rim of Heaven” - the mythological safe haven for all dragons.

recommendations.title: Manos: The Hands of Fate
recommendations.overview: A family gets lost on the road and stumbles upon a hidden, underground, devil-worshiping cult led by the fearsome Master and his servant Torgo.

recommendations.title: Mummies
recommendations.overview: Through a series of unfortunate events, three mummies end up in present-day London and embark on a wacky and hilarious journey in search of an old ring belonging to the Royal Family, stolen by ambitious archaeologist Lord Carnaby.

recommendations.title: The Boy, the Mole, the Fox and the Horse
recommendations.overview: The unlikely friendship of a boy, a mole, a fox and a horse traveling together in the boy's search for home.

recommendations.title: High School of the Dead: Drifters of the Dead
recommendations.overview: In their efforts to find a safe haven from the zombie apocalypse, the gang find themselves on a deserted island. Now, they take advantage of the momentary respite to enjoy some surf, sand and bathing suits!

recommendations.title: The Star
recommendations.overview: A small but brave donkey and his animal friends become the unsung heroes of the greatest story ever told: the first Christmas.

recommendations.title: Don't Breathe 2
recommendations.overview: The Blind Man has been hiding out for several years in an isolated cabin and has taken in and raised a young girl orphaned from a devastating house fire. Their quiet life together is shattered when a group of criminals kidnap the girl, forcing the Bl

recommendations.title: Paddington
recommendations.overview: A young Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

recommendations.title: Hounddog
recommendations.overview: A drama set in the American South, where a precocious, troubled girl finds a safe haven in the music and movement of Elvis Presley.
